nodes.label: P2.0 synth control — no wall (F3+ curve is FLAT)
nodes.rationale: Same F3+ layout as the CIFAR wall figure but on synth Tier-B: deep-SCFF slope is +/-0.0005/layer (flat), pure-GD envelope rises then saturates near 0.96. Used as the negative control proving the CIFAR depth-wall is a real dataset property, not a probe/script artifact.
